deep_dive.title: G$^2$TAM: Geometry Grounded Track Anything Model
deep_dive.abstract: Human spatial understanding arises from jointly perceiving geometry and semantics, enabling consistent object identification and localization across viewpoints and time. Current video segmentation models depend on explicit object appearance memory banks for instance tracking, yet they remain vulnerable to large viewpoint changes and long-term occlusions. Leveraging the spatial consistency afforded by modern feed-forward 3D reconstruction models, we propose the Geometry Grounded Tracking Anything Model (G$^2$TAM), a unified framework for promptable instance tracking in 3D using only unordered RGB images or videos. G$^2$TAM employs spatially aligned geometric representations as implicit memory, ensuring stable instance identity and localization across frames and views. At its core is a cross-modal spatial encoder that integrates visual and textual prompts into a shared geometric space, enabling end-to-end spatial reconstruction and instance-consistent mask prediction. To support training and evaluation, we construct InsTrack, a large-scale dataset with a dedicated validation split for benchmarking. Extensive experiments show that G$^2$TAM delivers strong cross-view consistency, promptable instance spatial tracking, video object segmentation and spatial reconstruction, establishing a foundation for interactive, geometry-grounded spatial reasoning.
deep_dive.llm_evidence_en: proposes a tracking any model for promptable instance tracking
deep_dive.llm_evidence_cn: 提出了一种可提示的实例跟踪模型
deep_dive.llm_evidence: 提出了一种可提示的实例跟踪模型
deep_dive.canonical_evidence: 提出了一种可提示的实例跟踪模型
deep_dive.llm_tldr_en: G^2TAM uses geometric representations as implicit memory for stable instance tracking across frames and views, enabling promptable instance tracking from unordered RGB images or videos.
deep_dive.llm_tldr_cn: 现有视频分割模型依赖显式外观记忆进行实例跟踪，但在大视角变化和长期遮挡下表现脆弱。G^2TAM利用前馈3D重建模型的空间一致性，采用空间对齐的几何表示作为隐式记忆，提出统一的几何基础跟踪模型，仅使用无序RGB图像或视频即可进行可提示的实例跟踪，确保跨帧和视角的稳定身份和定位。该方法在跟踪鲁棒性上取得显著提升。
deep_dive.llm_tldr: 现有视频分割模型依赖显式外观记忆进行实例跟踪，但在大视角变化和长期遮挡下表现脆弱。G^2TAM利用前馈3D重建模型的空间一致性，采用空间对齐的几何表示作为隐式记忆，提出统一的几何基础跟踪模型，仅使用无序RGB图像或视频即可进行可提示的实例跟踪，确保跨帧和视角的稳定身份和定位。该方法在跟踪鲁棒性上取得显著提升。

deep_dive.title: Learning Structured Visual Compositional Representations for Weakly Supervised Referring Expression Comprehension
deep_dive.abstract: Referring expression comprehension (REC) aims to localize the object in an image described by natural language. In Weakly supervised REC (WREC), existing approaches primarily operate on anchor-level visual representations. Even when enriched with auxiliary cues, relational interactions remain implicitly encoded within individual anchor features. The resulting visual representation remains flat and unary-only, limiting its ability to align with the structured nature of language. In this work, we propose a Structured Visual Compositional Representation (SVCR) learning framework for WREC. Rather than implicitly encoding relations within unary anchors, the proposed SVCR explicitly models both unary object embeddings and pairwise relational embeddings, forming a structured visual representation space. We further introduce a compositional alignment mechanism that matches unary and pairwise visual representations with their corresponding textual embeddings in a unified manner, enabling compositional visual-textual matching under weak supervision. Extensive experiments on RefCOCO, RefCOCO+, and RefCOCOg show that the proposed SVCR achieves state-of-the-art performance. These results demonstrate the effectiveness of explicit structured visual representations and visual-textual alignment for WREC.
deep_dive.llm_evidence_en: directly addresses referring expression comprehension, which is equivalent to referring tracking
deep_dive.llm_evidence_cn: 直接针对指代表达理解，即指代跟踪任务
deep_dive.llm_evidence: 直接针对指代表达理解，即指代跟踪任务
deep_dive.canonical_evidence: 直接针对指代表达理解，即指代跟踪任务
deep_dive.llm_tldr_en: Existing weakly supervised REC methods use flat anchor representations; SVCR explicitly models unary and relational embeddings, improving alignment with structured language and localization accuracy.
deep_dive.llm_tldr_cn: 弱监督指代表达理解中，现有方法使用扁平锚点表示，难以对齐语言结构。本文提出结构化视觉组合表示（SVCR），显式建模对象的一元嵌入与关系嵌入，提升对指代描述的定位能力。在公开基准上达到新最优，为指代跟踪提供强基线。
deep_dive.llm_tldr: 弱监督指代表达理解中，现有方法使用扁平锚点表示，难以对齐语言结构。本文提出结构化视觉组合表示（SVCR），显式建模对象的一元嵌入与关系嵌入，提升对指代描述的定位能力。在公开基准上达到新最优，为指代跟踪提供强基线。

deep_dive.title: Personalized Object Identification and Localization via In-Context Inference with Vision-Language Models
deep_dive.abstract: Personalized object localization (POL) localizes an object instance in a query image based on a few reference images with bounding-box annotations and a target object label. The pioneering method, IPLoc, solves this task through in-context inference with vision-language models (VLMs). However, it assumes that the query image always contains the target object. This assumption severely limits its applicability to real-world scenarios with many irrelevant images. To address this issue, we formulate a new task, personalized object identification and localization (POIL), by positioning POL within the broader few-shot object detection framework. POIL aims to localize the target object instance while rejecting query images that do not contain the reference object instance. We also present POIL datasets constructed from public sources. We further propose an in-context algorithm named IPLoc-ID for solving POIL with VLMs. IPLoc-ID first predicts a candidate bounding box and then determines whether it corresponds to the reference object instance. We introduce a self-posed query to connect these two steps within a single autoregressive generation framework. Through ablation studies and comprehensive experiments, we show that IPLoc-ID substantially suppresses false-positive detections on negative query images while maintaining localization performance comparable to IPLoc. Overall, IPLoc-ID effectively addresses the practical instance-level POIL task, which cannot be sufficiently solved by conventional object detection, few-shot object detection, or the localization-only IPLoc method.
deep_dive.llm_evidence_en: personalized object localization with VLMs, directly applicable to visual object tracking
deep_dive.llm_evidence_cn: 基于VLM的个性化目标定位，可直接用于视觉目标跟踪
deep_dive.llm_evidence: 基于VLM的个性化目标定位，可直接用于视觉目标跟踪
deep_dive.canonical_evidence: 基于VLM的个性化目标定位，可直接用于视觉目标跟踪
deep_dive.llm_tldr_en: Extends personalized object localization to identification+localization using in-context inference with VLMs, enabling rejection of irrelevant images and improving robustness for tracking-like scenarios.
deep_dive.llm_tldr_cn: 现有个性化目标定位方法假设查询图像始终包含目标，不切实际。本文提出POIL任务，利用VLM的上下文推理同时进行目标识别与定位，并拒绝不含目标的图像。该方法增强了少样本目标定位的鲁棒性，可支撑视觉跟踪中的目标再识别与初始化。
deep_dive.llm_tldr: 现有个性化目标定位方法假设查询图像始终包含目标，不切实际。本文提出POIL任务，利用VLM的上下文推理同时进行目标识别与定位，并拒绝不含目标的图像。该方法增强了少样本目标定位的鲁棒性，可支撑视觉跟踪中的目标再识别与初始化。

quick_skim.title: Green for Go, Red for No: Visual Grounding via Semantic Segmentation for VLA Navigation Policies
quick_skim.abstract: Vision-language-action (VLA) models enable robot navigation from natural language and visual goals, but remain susceptible to perceptual distractions and ambiguous scene interpretations. This paper presents the first empirical evaluation of visual grounding for VLA navigation policies. We propose a real-time segmentation-based grounding method that highlights traversable areas in green and non-traversable areas in red using SegFormer. Two variants are evaluated: observation-only segmentation and joint observation-goal augmentation. Using OmniVLA on the Grand Tour dataset, we show that visual grounding reduces the mean waypoint error by 27-44% at the farthest waypoint, depending on the instruction length. The benefits are greater for long instructions than for short instructions, and grounding provides little improvement for image goals. Normalized error analysis indicates that grounding primarily acts as a trajectory length regularizer, reducing the predicted path length by 30% without improving per-unit-distance reasoning. Our results indicate that visual grounding offers a simple, computationally inexpensive method to improve VLA navigation without model retraining, although it cannot compensate for missing training signals in out-of-distribution instructions.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: visual grounding for VLA navigation, related to referring tracking
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 面向VLA导航的视觉接地，与指代跟踪相关
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 面向VLA导航的视觉接地，与指代跟踪相关
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 面向VLA导航的视觉接地，与指代跟踪相关
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: Proposes a real-time segmentation-based visual grounding method for VLA navigation, reducing waypoint error by 27-44% at farthest waypoint.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: VLA模型在导航中易受感知干扰和场景歧义影响。该论文首次评估了视觉接地对VLA导航策略的影响，提出基于SegFormer的实时分割接地方法，将可通行区域标绿、不可通行区域标红，在Grand Tour数据集上使用OmniVLA验证，最远航点误差降低27-44%，表明视觉接地能显著提升导航性能。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: VLA模型在导航中易受感知干扰和场景歧义影响。该论文首次评估了视觉接地对VLA导航策略的影响，提出基于SegFormer的实时分割接地方法，将可通行区域标绿、不可通行区域标红，在Grand Tour数据集上使用OmniVLA验证，最远航点误差降低27-44%，表明视觉接地能显著提升导航性能。

quick_skim.title: Segmenting, Fast and Slow: Real-Time Open-Vocabulary Video Instance Segmentation with Dual-Path Processing
quick_skim.abstract: Object-centric models inspired by DETR have become the dominant paradigm for open-vocabulary video instance segmentation (OV-VIS). While recent efforts have reduced the computational cost of pixel decoding, textual modality fusion, and object decoding to make these architectures more suitable for mobile devices, real-time on-device inference at high frame rates remains an open challenge. In this paper, we introduce SegFS, a dual-stream fast-slow framework that significantly improves efficiency without sacrificing accuracy. On sparse keyframes, an open-vocabulary object-based model predicts instance-level representations. These representations are then projected back into the backbone feature space to condition a lightweight fast network, which efficiently relocalizes and segments the instances in subsequent frames. By shifting instance propagation from object decoding to feature-space conditioning, our approach decouples multimodal semantic understanding from dense mask prediction and enables efficient temporal propagation. The proposed fast branch achieves up to 14x lower latency than the mobile-oriented MOBIUS model, while maintaining competitive segmentation performance on standard OV-VIS benchmarks.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: open-vocabulary video instance segmentation shares technical core with tracking, enabling object detection across frames
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 开放词汇视频实例分割与跟踪共享技术核心，可实现跨帧目标检测
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 开放词汇视频实例分割与跟踪共享技术核心，可实现跨帧目标检测
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 开放词汇视频实例分割与跟踪共享技术核心，可实现跨帧目标检测
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: Proposes dual-stream fast-slow framework for real-time open-vocabulary video instance segmentation, leveraging keyframe decoupling for efficiency; relevant to tracking via instance-level object detection in video.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 实时开放词汇视频实例分割面临计算挑战。本文提出双流快慢框架SegFS，在稀疏关键帧上运行开放词汇模型，将实例表示投影回特征空间以快速传播。该方法在保持精度的同时实现高效视频目标感知，其技术思路可用于视觉跟踪中的目标检测与关联。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 实时开放词汇视频实例分割面临计算挑战。本文提出双流快慢框架SegFS，在稀疏关键帧上运行开放词汇模型，将实例表示投影回特征空间以快速传播。该方法在保持精度的同时实现高效视频目标感知，其技术思路可用于视觉跟踪中的目标检测与关联。
